_vectors_note: Direct port of the branch's get_intervene_vectors.py: both directions are harmful-vs-harmless (datasets pooled across accepted AND refused), read at two different slots. Slot 0 = t_inst, slot 1 = t_post. The branch used token_position -1 for t_post, which on this 25-slot layout would be </think> (slot 24), not t_post.
_max_token_generate_note: Measured on 59 real 9b genthink rows: tokens needed just to CLOSE </think> are median 1017, p90 2029, p95 2438, max 3477. At 512 only 18.6% of rows reach an answer; 2048 reaches 91.5%, 4096 reaches 100%. Rows that never close are labelled TRUNCATED and excluded from the rate, never judged.
_batch_size_note: complete_with_intervention is already batch-aware; the qwen35 branch sets padding_side='left' so batching is correct. At batch 1 a 12-layer band would take ~17h at 2048 tokens.
